title: MCBU Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: MCBU Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: MCBU B.Ed Time Table 2026 has been released. Check Maharaja Chhatrasal Bundelkhand University B.Ed exam dates, subject-wise schedule, and download the official time table PDF. Get the latest updates on exam timings and instructions.

content.text: Maharaja Chhatrasal Bundelkhand University, Chhatarpur (MCBU) has officially released the B.Ed II-Semester and IV-Semester Examination Time Table 2026 along with various postgraduate IVth semester time tables for the June-2026 examinations on the official website www.mchbu.ac.in. The theory exams are scheduled to be held in May and June 2026. Students can check the complete MCBU Time Table 2026 and download the official PDF directly from the university portal. The schedule is available for immediate download without any login credentials or roll number. It is advised to verify all details carefully and contact the university in case of any discrepancy.
Download the MCBU Time Table 2026 PDF here

links.text: Download the MCBU Time Table 2026 PDF here

content.text: The MCBU Time Table 2026 provides the complete schedule for B.Ed II-Semester and IV-Semester examinations to be held in June 2026. This official timetable helps students plan their revision and appear confidently in the exams.

rows: Language Sanskrit / Language Hindi / Urdu Biological Science
Social Science (History, Civics, Geo, Eco) Mathematics / Commerce Language Across The Curriculum

Environmental Education (Optional) Action Research (Optional) Futurology in Education (Optional) Health And Physical Education (Optional) Guidance And Counseling in School (Optional) Value Education (Optional)

content.text: The MCBU Time Table 2026 Subject Wise gives students a clear view of all theory papers for B.Ed II and IV semester examinations. The schedule covers core subjects as well as optional papers and is designed to help candidates prepare effectively for the June 2026 exams. Students must follow the exact dates and timings mentioned in the official notification to avoid any last-minute issues.

rows: Language Sanskrit / Language Hindi / Urdu Biological Science
Social Science (History, Civics, Geo, Eco) Mathematics / Commerce Language Across The Curriculum

Environmental Education (Optional) Action Research (Optional) Futurology in Education (Optional) Health And Physical Education (Optional) Guidance And Counseling in School (Optional) Value Education (Optional)

sections.heading: How to Download MCBU Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can download the MCBU Time Table 2026 directly from the official university website in a few easy steps. The process is simple and does not require any login.

items: Open your browser and visit the official website of Maharaja Chhatrasal Bundelkhand University at www.mchbu.ac.in.
Navigate to the Examinations or Latest Notifications section on the homepage.
Look for the link titled B.Ed II-Semester / IV-Semester or PG IV Semester Examination June-2026 and click on it.
The PDF file will open automatically - click the download button to save it on your device.
Open the downloaded file, verify the dates and subjects, then print a copy for easy reference during preparation.

content.text: Always cross-check the official timetable carefully and keep a printed copy handy for smooth exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in MCBU Time Table 2026

content.text: The MCBU Time Table 2026 contains all essential information students need for the June 2026 examinations. It ensures complete clarity on schedule and rules for B.Ed and PG courses.

items: Exact examination dates and days for each subject
Full list of subjects for B.Ed II Semester and B.Ed IV Semester
Time of exam: 02.00 PM to 05.00 PM (for B.Ed papers)
Clear mention of optional papers in B.Ed IV Semester
Important note that the timetable is tentative and changeable
Applicability for Regular, ATKT and Ex students
Official issuance dates in April 2026
Signature of the Examination Controller
